requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radio Act (電波法) and VCCI Voluntary Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC — 电波法及 VCCI 自愿性要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC — 電波法及 VCCI 自願性要求

summary.en: Japan's Radio Act (電波法), administered by the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications (MIC), regulates radio frequency (RF) emissions from electronic devices to prevent harmful interference with radio communications. Electrical equipment that generates radio frequency emissions — including power electronics in BESS (inverters, BMS communication modules, converters) — must comply with emission limits set under the Radio Act. Voluntary Control Council for Interference (VCCI), a voluntary industry body, establishes EMC emission limits for information technology equipment based on CISPR standards; VCCI self-declaration is commercially expected and is widely required by Japanese customers and distributors even where not legally mandatory for all product types. Technical standards under the Electricity Business Act also encompass electromagnetic compatibility aspects of high-voltage/power electrical installations.
summary.zh: 日本《电波法》由总务省（MIC）负责管理，对电子设备的射频（RF）辐射进行规制，以防止对无线电通信造成有害干扰。产生射频辐射的电气设备——包括BESS中的电力电子器件（逆变器、BMS通信模块、变换器）——须符合《电波法》规定的辐射限值。VCCI（电波障害自主规制协议会）是一家自愿性行业机构，基于CISPR标准制定信息技术设备EMC辐射限值；VCCI自我声明在商业上被广泛期待，即便对于部分产品类型并非法律强制，日本客户和分销商通常亦要求提供。《电气事业法》下的技术标准也涵盖高压/大功率电气装置的电磁兼容方面。
summary.zht: 日本《電波法》由總務省（MIC）負責管理，對電子設備的射頻（RF）輻射進行規制，以防止對無線電通信造成有害干擾。產生射頻輻射的電氣設備——包括BESS中的電力電子器件（逆變器、BMS通信模組、變換器）——須符合《電波法》規定的輻射限值。VCCI（電波障害自主規制協議會）是一家自願性行業機構，基於CISPR標準制定信息技術設備EMC輻射限值；VCCI自我聲明在商業上被廣泛期待，即便對於部分產品類型並非法律強制，日本客戶和分銷商通常亦要求提供。《電氣事業法》下的技術標準也涵蓋高壓/大功率電氣裝置的電磁兼容方面。

standards_or_laws: 電波法 (Radio Act) — administered by Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications (MIC)
VCCI (Voluntary Control Council for Interference) — industry voluntary EMC limits based on CISPR 32 / CISPR 11
電気設備に関する技術基準 (Technical Standards for Electrical Equipment) — EMC aspects for power installations

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for electrical and electronic equipment are set by the GB/T 17626 series (EMC testing standards, equivalent to IEC 61000 series) and GB 9254 (Information Technology Equipment — Radio Disturbance Characteristics). CCC certification for applicable product categories includes EMC testing. GB EMC test results are not accepted by VCCI or MIC as substitutes for Japanese Radio Act or VCCI compliance verification.
summary.zh: 中国电气和电子设备的EMC要求由GB/T 17626系列（EMC测试标准，等同于IEC 61000系列）和GB 9254（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性）规定。适用产品类别的CCC认证包含EMC测试。GB EMC测试结果不被VCCI或MIC接受为日本《电波法》或VCCI合规验证的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國電氣和電子設備的EMC要求由GB/T 17626系列（EMC測試標準，等同於IEC 61000系列）和GB 9254（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性）規定。適用產品類別的CCC認證包含EMC測試。GB EMC測試結果不被VCCI或MIC接受為日本《電波法》或VCCI合規驗證的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series — 电磁兼容 测试和测量技术 (EMC testing and measurement, equivalent to IEC 61000 series)
GB 9254-2021 — 信息技术设备无线电骚扰限值和测量方法 (Radio disturbance limits and methods for IT equipment)

gap.en: Chinese BESS inverters, BMS modules, and power conversion equipment must comply with Japanese Radio Act emission limits and obtain VCCI self-declaration (or equivalent) before sale or installation in Japan. Chinese GB EMC test data does not substitute for Radio Act or VCCI compliance. VCCI membership and self-declaration is the standard commercial pathway for EMC compliance in Japan for information technology and power electronics equipment. BESS products with wireless communication modules (Wi-Fi, cellular, Bluetooth) must separately comply with Radio Act technical standards for radio transmitters.
gap.zh: 中国BESS逆变器、BMS模块和电力变换设备在日本销售或安装前，须符合日本《电波法》辐射限值并取得VCCI自我声明（或等效文件）。中国GB EMC测试数据不能替代《电波法》或VCCI合规证明。VCCI会员资格和自我声明是日本信息技术及电力电子设备EMC合规的标准商业路径。搭载无线通信模块（Wi-Fi、蜂窝、蓝牙）的BESS产品还须另行符合《电波法》对无线电发射设备的技术标准。
gap.zht: 中國BESS逆變器、BMS模組和電力變換設備在日本銷售或安裝前，須符合日本《電波法》輻射限值並取得VCCI自我聲明（或等效文件）。中國GB EMC測試數據不能替代《電波法》或VCCI合規證明。VCCI會員資格和自我聲明是日本信息技術及電力電子設備EMC合規的標準商業路徑。搭載無線通信模組（Wi-Fi、蜂窩、藍牙）的BESS產品還須另行符合《電波法》對無線電發射設備的技術標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for RF-emitting equipment under the Radio Act; VCCI self-declaration is voluntary but commercially required by most Japanese customers and distributors
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory EMC compliance under GB 9254 and GB/T 17626 for applicable product categories in China; CCC includes EMC for designated products

source.publisher: Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications (MIC), Japan — Telecommunications Bureau

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS power electronics and communication modules must comply with Japanese Radio Act emission requirements before sale or installation in Japan. VCCI self-declaration is the standard commercial pathway and is expected by Japanese customers even where not legally mandatory. Chinese GB EMC certificates do not substitute. Wireless communication modules require separate Radio Act type-certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国BESS电力电子器件和通信模块在日本销售或安装前，须符合日本《电波法》辐射要求。VCCI自我声明是标准商业路径，即便不具法律强制性，日本客户通常亦会要求。中国GB EMC证书不能替代。无线通信模块须另行进行《电波法》型式认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國BESS電力電子器件和通信模組在日本銷售或安裝前，須符合日本《電波法》輻射要求。VCCI自我聲明是標準商業路徑，即便不具法律強制性，日本客戶通常亦會要求。中國GB EMC證書不能替代。無線通信模組須另行進行《電波法》型式認證。
